programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Marcus & Abi have one hundred thousand pounds to build luxurious off grid family home in Pembrokeshire woodland using One Planet Development law, determination & local timber.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Former infantryman Ben bought this modest weatherboard in New Norfolk, northwest of Hobart, in 2008, confident it was an idyllic place to raise his family but when his wife Claire's father died suddenly in 2010, they decided to move back to the mainland closer to family and quickly bought in Victoria. They put New Norfolk on the market where it's remained on/off for five years, bringing in a modest rent. With four children, Ben is struggling with the two mortgages and works most weekends, missing out on the kids' sports etc. With a new agent on the case, it's time to upgrade New Norfolk and offload it once and for all.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Maree is a mother of three grown boys who lost her husband 14 years ago, just before buying her house on half an acre at Cobbitty, an outer western Sydney suburb. It's a character-filled old weatherboard which needs a lot of work to make it market ready. Everyone wants to see it looking new and fabulous, so the SHA team are going to come in very handy, especially as Maree has already bought elsewhere and is now desperate to sell.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team come to Folkstone to surprise five-year-old Isla, who lives with a form of severe epilepsy. The team create a sensory wonderland packed with fun garden features that she loves.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: Ruth visits Monreith House, which is an imposing Georgian Mansion built in 1799 near Port William in southwest Scotland, and is home to Sir Michael Maxwell.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without a Trace

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Brett and Rees are the proud parents of three young boys and desperately need more space. They love their inner-west community in Sydney's Annandale, so the plan is to build on the small empty allotment behind their apartment. The first sod has barely been turned when one of the heritage buildings on their boundary is in danger of collapsing. Exhausted by ongoing battles and a build that's months behind schedule, will Brett and Rees have enough grit and determination to see their project through to completion?

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back to catch up with two sets of househunters. Rik and Helen in Manchester and Alison and Phil in Herefordshire were all in a race against time to find family homes and move in before the stork delivered some tiny feet. As well as being up against it time wise, Kirstie and Phil found themselves battling big expectations and very tight budgets. Now it's time to catch up with them and find out whether their massive moves paid off.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. When he finds himself training a detachment of Top Gun graduates for a specialised mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen, Maverick encounters Lt. Bradley Bradshaw, call sign: "Rooster", the son of Maverick's late friend and Radar Intercept Officer Lt. Nick Bradshaw, aka "Goose". Facing an uncertain future and confronting the ghosts of his past, Maverick is drawn into a confrontation with his own deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who will be chosen to fly it.

programme.title: Emmanuelle
programme.desc: Emmanuelle travels alone to Hong Kong on a business mission. In the vibrant and sensual global city, she indulges in intense encounters and new experiences.

programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Stranded in a remote town with no escape, Maya faces another terrifying night as three ruthless killers return to hunt. To survive, she must end their murderous spree.

programme.title: The Parenting
programme.desc: Boyfriends Rohan and Josh plan a perfect weekend getaway in the country to introduce their parents. But as tensions begin to flare between the more traditional Sharon and Frank, and the laid-back Liddy and Cliff, the families soon realise that their rental, managed by eccentric local Brenda, is haunted by the presence of a 400-year-old poltergeist. When one parent becomes thoroughly possessed, it's up to the young couple and their meddlesome BFF Sara to unite the families and stop the evil entity once and for all.

programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: Ghost Cat Anzu
programme.desc: A headstrong girl moves to rural Japan with her grandfather, a monk. She forms an unlikely friendship with an unpredictable supernatural cat guardian.

programme.title: Mr Burton
programme.desc: The true story of the wild school boy Rich Jenkins, son of a boozy miner, and the English teacher who recognised his talent, Philip Burton.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her past.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Novocaine No Pain

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: Top assassins battle in a brutal underground tournament, but a rogue crew aims to survive, outsmart the killers, and bring down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: King of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Dakota Adams, son of Oath Keepers' Stewart Rhodes, explores the American militia movement and his father's conviction for seditious conspiracy, amidst a turbulent family life.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand (Jonah Hill) who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe (Philip Seymour Hoffman) refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model, Alan, sets off on a heroic but hapless rescue mission. Thrust into an epic thrill-ride through the jungle, the unlikely pair must work together to survive the elements, and survive each other, to find the city's fabled treasure before it's lost forever.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: April, 1945. As the Allies make their final push in the European Theatre, a battle-hardened army sergeant named Wardaddy commands a Sherman tank and her five-man crew on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Outnumbered and out-gunned, and with a rookie soldier thrust into their platoon, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds in their heroic attempts to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Mickey O'Neil, a bare knuckles gypsy fighter, is roped in to save the necks of two small-time operators whose scheming collides with that of a lunatic kingpin villain, Brick Top, and a missing diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Moneyball

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: An epic tale, set in the Rocky Mountains of Montana in the early 1900s, of three brothers and their father living in the remote wilderness and how their lives are affected by love, betrayal and brotherhood. After being discharged, Colonel Ludlow decides to raise his three sons in the wilds of Montana, where they can grow up away from the government and society he has learned to despise. As the brothers set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threatens to tear apart their once indestructible bond when Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: Rory warms to the family but cannot forget his mission, which is to buy missiles that could change the balance of power between the Irish rebels and the British forces. O'Meara is devastated when his own family and home are threatened as Rory's plan brings the conflict into this otherwise happy home.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: April, 1945. As the Allies make their final push in the European Theatre, a battle-hardened army sergeant named Wardaddy commands a Sherman tank and her five-man crew on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Outnumbered and out-gunned, and with a rookie soldier thrust into their platoon, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds in their heroic attempts to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: Rory warms to the family but cannot forget his mission, which is to buy missiles that could change the balance of power between the Irish rebels and the British forces. O'Meara is devastated when his own family and home are threatened as Rory's plan brings the conflict into this otherwise happy home.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Mickey O'Neil, a bare knuckles gypsy fighter, is roped in to save the necks of two small-time operators whose scheming collides with that of a lunatic kingpin villain, Brick Top, and a missing diamond smuggler.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model, Alan, sets off on a heroic but hapless rescue mission. Thrust into an epic thrill-ride through the jungle, the unlikely pair must work together to survive the elements, and survive each other, to find the city's fabled treasure before it's lost forever.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand (Jonah Hill) who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe (Philip Seymour Hoffman) refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: An epic tale, set in the Rocky Mountains of Montana in the early 1900s, of three brothers and their father living in the remote wilderness and how their lives are affected by love, betrayal and brotherhood. After being discharged, Colonel Ludlow decides to raise his three sons in the wilds of Montana, where they can grow up away from the government and society he has learned to despise. As the brothers set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threatens to tear apart their once indestructible bond when Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca is that girl who'd rather listen to what's coming out of her headphones than what's coming out of you. Arriving at her new college, she finds herself not right for any clique but somehow is muscled into one that she never would have picked on her own: alongside mean girls, sweet girls and weird girls whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together, in the out-loud comedy Pitch Perfect. When Beca takes this acoustic singing group out of their world of traditional arrangements and perfect harmonies into all-new mash-ups, they fight to climb their way to the top of the cutthroat world of college a cappella. This could wind up either the coolest thing they'll ever do or the most insane, and it will probably be a little of both.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Here Today
programme.desc: Veteran comedy writer Charlie Burnz forms an unlikely yet hilarious and touching friendship with New York lounge singer Emma Payge. Emma unexpectedly wins a lunch with the comedy legend, and their friendship gets off to an extremely rocky start (think seafood allergy, a hospital visit, and an epi pen). Before long, each finds in the other a sort of soul mate, forging a deep bond that kicks the generation gap aside and redefines the meaning of friendship, love, and trust.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.

programme.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
programme.desc: A delightful comedy about finding love in the most unexpected places. Two successful New Yorkers, Paul and Meryl, are at their wits' end with repairing their strained marriage. But when they become the only witnesses to a brutal murder, the police hide them away in Wyoming, together. Now these die-hard city dwellers will have to survive the weather, bears, fresh air, and forced time with one another if they want to make it out alive.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of today's most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer. As the victims begin to pile up and the laughs pile on, none of your favourite scary movies escape the razor-sharp satire of this outrageously funny parody.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt, or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss, so every night all memory of her day is erased, but a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: Thrown together under tragic circumstances, three generations of women from the same family are forced to learn to live together on a small rural chicken farm in New Jersey.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Gwen and Eddie are 'America's Sweethearts' - the country's favourite couple, on-screen and off, but when their very public romance turns into a very private break-up, only veteran press agent Lee and Gwen's assistant, Kiki, can help Gwen and Eddie show some love while they promote their last film together. The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Jay and Annie are a married couple still very much in love, but ten years and two kids have cooled the passion. To get it back, they decide - why not? - to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy Of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea, until they discover that their most private video has gone public. In a panic, they begin a wild night of adventure - tracking down leads, roping in friends, duping Annie's boss - all to reclaim their video, their reputation, their sanity, and, most importantly, their marriage.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, this group of awesome nerds will come together to make some music, and some questionable decisions, one last time.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: Discover Donna's young life, experiencing the fun she had with the three possible dads of Sophie. Sophie is now pregnant. Like Donna, she'll be a young mother, and she realizes that she'll need to take risks like her mother did.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: Sundays at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Jane, a soon-to-be-married woman, is reunited with her imaginary friend, Michael, who returns in human form. Soon, Jane begins doubting her feelings for her fiance as she becomes attracted to Michael.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: She's a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He's the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it's threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman goes undercover at her family's chocolate factory to find out why sales are down. She meets the head chocolatier, who has new ideas for Easter products.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman goes undercover at her family's chocolate factory to find out why sales are down. She meets the head chocolatier, who has new ideas for Easter products.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious romantic comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when brilliant divorce attorney Miles Massey meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin Rexroth.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Mila Kunis star as best friends who are both coming out of disastrous relationships. They decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact vowing to stop the casual sex if either become emotionally attached. While the set-up works at first, soon the two friends fall in love and must re-evaluate what they mean to each other.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: Take a lesson from Cameron Diaz when she stars as Elizabeth Halsey, a foulmouthed, ruthless and inappropriate teacher. She drinks, gets high and can't wait to marry a meal ticket to get out of her bogus day job. When she's dumped by her fiance, she sets her sights on a rich, handsome substitute (Justin Timberlake) while shrugging off the advances of the school gym teacher (Jason Segel). The consequences of her wild and outrageous schemes give her students, co-workers', and even herself, an education like no other.

While the set-up works at first, soon the two friends fall in love and must re-evaluate what they mean to each other.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: An ambitious U.S. Senator reflects back on his life after the death of a woman whom he loved and kept in contact with only through correspondence. The two first meet as children and begin their lifelong correspondence. He grows into his political aspirations and leaves her behind, as she becomes a struggling artist. While he is successful, she has a rocky life.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove, her father and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: An ambitious U.S. Senator reflects back on his life after the death of a woman whom he loved and kept in contact with only through correspondence. The two first meet as children and begin their lifelong correspondence. He grows into his political aspirations and leaves her behind, as she becomes a struggling artist. While he is successful, she has a rocky life.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Tim Lake discovers he can travel in time. The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life - so he decides to make his world a better place ... by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary. They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too. This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: A young Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, miles from home. He is eventually adopted by an Australian couple, but years later he sets out to find his lost family.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals continue to baffle police by pulling off perfectly executed bank robberies. They are in and out like clockwork, leaving no evidence behind and laying low in between heists. But when they attempt to pull off one last job with more money at stake than ever before, the crew may find their plans interrupted by a hardened detective who is hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Innocents Lost
programme.desc: A reinstated police chief (Tom Selleck) battles his own demons while investigating the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: You can kill a man but not a legend. Ned Kelly and his brother Dan, sons of an Irish pig thief exiled to the Australian penal colony in 1843, formed the core of the Kelly Gang (with two other men), an outlaw gang that roamed across Australia for over two wild years. Kelly was a clever bandit, making his own homemade armour, including steel chest plates and helmets, to stop bullets from stopping him. Kelly was first arrested at 16 for horse stealing, but he became an outlaw when he killed a police officer who was harassing his brother.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Les Miserables (2012)
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of 19th-century France, this is the enthralling story of broken dreams and unrequited love, passion, sacrifice and redemption, and a timeless testament to the survival of the human spirit. Ex-prisoner Jean Valjean is hunted for decades by the ruthless policeman Javert after he breaks parole. When Valjean agrees to care for factory worker Fantine's young daughter, Cosette, their lives change forever.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Takers

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: April, 1945. As the Allies make their final push in the European Theatre, a battle-hardened army sergeant named Wardaddy commands a Sherman tank and her five-man crew on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Outnumbered and out-gunned, and with a rookie soldier thrust into their platoon, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds in their heroic attempts to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: Detective Nick Curran's investigation of a rock star's brutal murder leads him to glacial beauty and best-selling author Catherine Tramell. Despite Nick's entanglement with police psychologist Dr Beth Garner and the ever-present Roxy, Catherine's sultry and possessive girlfriend, the two begin a torrid affair. But when Nick discovers that Catherine's fictional, murderous storylines have a habit of coming true, he begins to wonder if his attraction to Catherine might turn out to be a fatal one.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Marriage Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hailey's professional code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession, so she must find another way to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: A single mother establishes a high-end escort service that matches beautiful young women with the wealthiest and most powerful men in the city.

programme.title: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: Detective Nick Curran's investigation of a rock star's brutal murder leads him to glacial beauty and best-selling author Catherine Tramell. programme.title: Hannibal

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: This film is inspired by the incredible true story that follows Alaskan State Trooper Jack Halcombe as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of Robert Hansen, a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years. As the bodies of street girls start to pile up in Anchorage, fear strikes a chord with the public. Risking his life, Halcombe goes on a personal manhunt to find the killer before the next body surfaces. When a seventeen year old escapee reveals key information about the case, Halcombe is finally on the trail of the killer. But will he catch him in time to save the next victim?

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.desc: Three best friends attempt to escape their suburban boredom through a life of crime. But these bickering, bumbling thieves are no match for the local 'godfather' who leads them into the biggest heist of their careers.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: Switched Before Birth
programme.desc: Olivia and Brian discover that one of their two new in vitro babies was implanted by mistake, turning their world upside down.

programme.title: Mahalia
programme.desc: Influential gospel singer Mahalia Jackson rises to fame in the 1940s and performs at numerous rallies during the civil rights movement.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Seemingly flawless medical student Philip Markoff leads a double life and starts to descend into a twisted world of gambling, crime, battery and eventually murder, all while meeting his victims through Craigslist.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne resurfaces just as his former employers are implementing a new program aimed at hunting him down. Now fully recovered from his amnesia, Bourne teams up with Nicky Parsons to uncover the truth behind his father's death, while simultaneously exacting revenge and evading the government forces hot on his trail.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.desc: Olivia and Brian discover that one of their two new in vitro babies was implanted by mistake, turning their world upside down.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a customer soars into the shop with a rare H.G. Wells book, and an astronomical asking price, will Corey shoot for the stars? Next, there's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick? Then, Chum spins over to LA to have a record collection appraised. Did he scratch on this deal, or will their value be music to his ears? And finally, Rick casts his line at a vintage Plymouth 'Cuda muscle car - but will it be enough for its owner to bite?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: There's No Crying In Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum tries to put his best foot forward when a Nike Lebron sneaker hits the counter. Will it be a slam dunk? Then, Rick keeps a close watch on a seller who comes in with a signed Pulp Fiction poster. Can he negotiate a royale-y good price? Next, Corey might be in over his head when several Jim Henson sculptures float his way. But is there something fishy about them? And later, all that glitters might not be gold when Rick and Chum head to the range to fire an antique pistol.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame is facing a journey filled with dread as a pandemic is stalking the country. The roads are usually busy but since lockdown the highway is empty apart from the police road blocks that have sprung up to enforce regional border controls. In central Western Australia, salvage trucker Michael Elliott is on the hunt for cars abandoned in the remote outback. In Darwin, long haul trucker Glenn Hasegawa has a monster move on his hands. He's shifting a $200 000, 70 tonne digger used for large excavation work on mining sites, but Glenn's already well behind schedule.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the wilds of Australia's Northern Territory, 24-year-old trucker Boe Vella crosses croc-infested rivers to deliver desperately needed goods before the wet season hits.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. Sue and Tom Marcoux have owned a piece of land for 15 years but without money to build, have been living out of an RV. Their lives are about to change, as Wade and Jaylene have found them the perfect recycled home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a customer soars into the shop with a rare H.G. Wells book, and an astronomical asking price, will Corey shoot for the stars? Next, there's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick? Then, Chum spins over to LA to have a record collection appraised. Did he scratch on this deal, or will their value be music to his ears? And finally, Rick casts his line at a vintage Plymouth 'Cuda muscle car - but will it be enough for its owner to bite?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: There's No Crying In Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum tries to put his best foot forward when a Nike Lebron sneaker hits the counter. Will it be a slam dunk? Then, Rick keeps a close watch on a seller who comes in with a signed Pulp Fiction poster. Can he negotiate a royale-y good price? Next, Corey might be in over his head when several Jim Henson sculptures float his way. But is there something fishy about them? And later, all that glitters might not be gold when Rick and Chum head to the range to fire an antique pistol.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: It's officially the third highest amount of snowfall in Manitoba in the last century. Commercial fishers are plagued by deep drifts and hidden pockets of slush that can stop them in their tracks. Chris finds out the hard way that travelling alone is a bad idea when he gets his bomber stuck, axle deep. Gene and Candace team up with Richard and Mike to attempt a dangerous crossing over the heaving ice ridge as both teams need to lift deeper nets on the other side. Trevor has a day from hell as he battles the elements, a series of breakdowns and the same deep snow that has bogged down all of the crews around him. Justin and Mike gamble by taking on more quota.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame is facing a journey filled with dread as a pandemic is stalking the country. The roads are usually busy but since lockdown the highway is empty apart from the police road blocks that have sprung up to enforce regional border controls. In central Western Australia, salvage trucker Michael Elliott is on the hunt for cars abandoned in the remote outback. In Darwin, long haul trucker Glenn Hasegawa has a monster move on his hands. He's shifting a $200 000, 70 tonne digger used for large excavation work on mining sites, but Glenn's already well behind schedule.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the wilds of Australia's Northern Territory, 24-year-old trucker Boe Vella crosses croc-infested rivers to deliver desperately needed goods before the wet season hits.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: This vast island continent is home to some of the hardest places to reach on Earth. But for the mega trucks that keep the country moving, getting there is just another day at the office. Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Experienced dirt-road driver Dennis Dent goes head-to-head with a lifelong enemy, while Christian Reynolds takes on the wild back country on a vital mission to build a bridge.

Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Turbo is fighting to stay on track and on schedule to complete a marathon trek home. Meanwhile, in Tasmania, Euan is hitching a ride to deliver a volatile road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers and, for the giant trucks who roam this epic, harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B - the hard way. Whether it's taking on scorching deserts, or battling torrential rains that turn roads into rivers, this is a land that can destroy in a heartbeat. For the men and women who risk their rigs and their lives to face it, this punishing wilderness is a home away from home. We hit the road train again for lots of dirt and dangers, joining some of the toughest, most skilled truckers on the planet, as they haul their massive loads through hell on Earth. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. Turbo's on a mission as he takes the biggest gamble of his career. Steve Grahame battles 2000 km of dirt, damage and dramas at the wheel of a monster load. Glen Waters faces disaster. In Townsville, Queensland, long-distance trucker Peter gets ready for a cross-country haul in which he has to move a mixed freight through bush, farmland and desert to Darwin.

Whether it's taking on scorching deserts, or battling torrential rains that turn roads into rivers, this is a land that can destroy in a heartbeat. For the men and women who risk their rigs and their lives to face it, this punishing wilderness is a home away from home. We hit the road train again for lots of dirt and dangers, joining some of the toughest, most skilled truckers on the planet, as they haul their massive loads through hell on Earth. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. In this episode, Matt Adams gets himself into trouble as he transports a bull, while the Kendalls share an experience as a family.
